title: AirOS Network Layer: delivery / acknowledgement receipt (v1)
description: Domain-agnostic transport and processing receipt for envelopes (message_envelope.v1). Reports delivery or processing disposition without inspecting payload semantics—no pollutants, thresholds, hazard levels, permits, SLA logic, congestion models, enforcement outcomes, tax logic, or other domain-derived decisions.

from_node.description: Reporting node issuing this receipt (often the receiver or intermediary).

to_node.description: Recipient of the receipt telemetry (often original sender or monitoring hub)—routing metadata only.

received_at.description: Wall-clock ingestion of the associated message into this node's transport/agent boundary.

processed_at.description: When optional processing/hand-off completed locally (routing pipeline only).

error_code.description: Carrier- or middleware-defined code (opaque to domain logic).

error_message.description: Carrier-safe diagnostic hint; must not expose restricted payload excerpts.

retryable.description: Whether the delivery/processing semantics allow a safe retry policy.

retry_after_seconds.description: Backoff hint for callers when retryable is true.

delivery_attempt.description: Monotonic counter for carrier attempts correlated to message_id.

transport.description: Carrier label (e.g. email, api, webhook, mq, sftp)—not interchange format details.

transport_message_ref.description: Opaque carrier tracking id (Message-ID, webhook delivery id, queue offset)—no payload.

audit_metadata.description: Hop counts, SLA timers, span ids—operational lineage only.
